lesson.title: Seasoning Techniques
lesson.description: Learn how to properly season your dishes to enhance flavor using herbs and spices.

steps.instruction: Understand the difference between herbs and spices.
Taste your dish before adding seasoning to determine what it needs.
Add salt gradually, tasting as you go.
Incorporate herbs at different stages: fresh at the end, dried at the beginning.
Experiment with different combinations to find your preferred flavors.
